module_name: 一般民眾財務生活快照
selected_for_v1_6_reason: This module is public-safe, useful for citizen-facing education, and can be tested with blank or fictional records before any private data policy exists.

public_safety.public_export_rule: Publish only blank structures, fictional examples, public references, and non-advisory workflow notes.

official_reference_sources.source_name: 金融監督管理委員會金融智慧網
official_reference_sources.use_in_prototype: Financial education and consumer awareness reference.
Plain-language categories for risk awareness, saving, consultation, and complaint routes.

official_reference_sources.source_name: 財團法人金融消費評議中心
official_reference_sources.use_in_prototype: Financial consumer dispute and complaint path reference.

prototype_intent.plain_language_goal: 協助一般民眾用中立欄位看懂自己的財務生活狀態，整理缺資料、壓力點、可用資源與下一步求助路徑。

snapshot_flow.input: 公開安全情境或空白模板
snapshot_flow.done_proof: 情境與問題只描述狀態，不要求工具下判斷
欄位只使用級距或狀態，不填公開頁不可出現的實值
摘要不包含個人化金融建議，也不推銷產品
下一步是整理資料、查公開資訊或找真人協助，不是自動決策

snapshot_flow.input: approved public references and blank template
snapshot_flow.done_proof: 官方參考與模板無變動時可回報 no-op

snapshot_fields.description: Stable ID for a blank or fictional snapshot.
Public artifacts may use only blank_template or fictional_example.
Plain situation label without private details.
Status label only; no income amount in public artifacts.
Status label; do not suggest repayment strategy.
Status label; no balance amount in public artifacts.
Signals life events that may require human review.
Public resources or consultation paths to check.
Information gaps to clarify before any next step.
Reminder that this is education and organization, not individualized advice.

partner_trial_task.title: Finance-life snapshot public-safe trial
partner_trial_task.task_size: one fictional situation, one blank snapshot, one missing-info list
stop_conditions: A real person's private financial details appear
The task starts recommending financial products
The task makes repayment, borrowing, insurance, investment, legal, or welfare eligibility decisions
The next step would contact an outside party
review_rubric: High-risk situations route to human review

taiwan_fit_gate.wording_fit: Uses plain Taiwan-facing labels such as 財務生活快照, 缺資料, 壓力點, 可用資源, 下一步, and 真人協助.
taiwan_fit_gate.workplace_habit_fit: Keeps Kevin review visible and lets partners work with fictional examples and official public references only.
taiwan_fit_gate.mobile_readability_fit: Public page uses short artifact cards and table summaries; detailed fields live in CSV and JSON.

next_version_candidates.candidate: Create a public-safe partner trial task packet for either social-resource cards or finance-life snapshots.
Create a private blank Google Sheets workboard only after Kevin approval.
Draft report-first freshness or knowledge-source automation without external writes.
